textPlain: It is obviously a choice why isn't done, but with static modules you can know whether * is overloaded. That will improve procuedure calls by a lot, almist always. sure, with polymorphic finctions you can get a bit of the way using inline caches, but in my experience knowing the callee is always going to be a speedup.

i use luau a lot as part as my Roblox development work, it's pretty fast for its main use case.there are people a lot more knowledgeable about this topic so i won't pretend to know this is possible, but could a versioning flag similar to the !native flag be added? it would allow both for backwards compatibility and better optimizations, although i know it might add complexity where it's not needed
